zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard of York 3rd Duke of York於1411年9月20日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素時，他的父親Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge26歲，母親Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge22歲。他於1429年10月18日與Cecily Neville在英國越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1431年登記服兵役。他於1453年在愛爾蘭被列為lieutenant of ireland。他去世於1460年12月30日在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德 聖 瑪麗享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾福瑟林加聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard of York 3rd Duke of York于1411年9月20日出生在英国英格兰越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素时，他的父亲Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge26岁，母亲Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge22岁。他于1429年10月18日与Cecily Neville在英国越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1431年登记服兵役。他于1453年在爱尔兰被列为lieutenant of ireland。他去世于1460年12月30日在英国英格兰越可爾衛克菲德 聖 瑪麗享年49岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾福瑟林加聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard of York 3rd Duke of York was born on 20 September 1411, in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge, was 26 and his mother, Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, was 22. He married Cecily Neville on 18 October 1429, in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1431. In 1453, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as lieutenant of ireland in Ireland. He died on 30 December 1460, in Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard of York 3rd Duke of York est né le 20 septembre 1411, à Conisbrough Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Neville le 18 octobre 1429, à Conisbrough Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1431. En 1453, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lieutenant of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1460, à Wakefield St Mary, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard of York 3rd Duke of York am 20. September 1411 in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge 26 und seine Mutter Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge 22. Er hat am 18. Oktober 1429 in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England Cecily Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1431 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1453, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lieutenant of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Dezember 1460 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, England: Kings Langley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito

it.killed in Battle of Wakefield, West Ridi: Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of York 3rd Duke of York è nato il il 20 settembre 1411 nel Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Neville il 18 ottobre 1429, nel Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1431. Nel 1453, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lieutenant of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì il 30 dicembre 1460, nel Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard of York 3rd Duke of Yorkが1411年9月20日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコニスブロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridgeは26歳，母Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridgeは22歳であった。1429年10月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアコニスブロウ カストルでCecily Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年に兵役登録をした。1453年，42歳の時，アイルランドでの職業はlieutenant of irelandと記録されている。彼は1460年12月30日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールド スト マリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフォスエリンガイスト マリー アンド アル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotherin: 영국 노르섬프토실르 포더잉하이 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.killed in Battle of Wakefield, West Ridi: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Richard of York 3rd Duke of York(이)가 1411년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 코니스브루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1429년 10월 18일 영국 요르크실르 코니스브루그h 카스틀에서 Cecily Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1453년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 lieutenant of ireland이었다. 그는 1460년 12월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드 스트 메리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 포더잉하이 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of York 3rd Duke of York nasceu em 20 de setembro de 1411, em Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Neville em 18 de outubro de 1429, em Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1431. Em 1453, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como lieutenant of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1460, em Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotherin: ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, фотирингхеи, нортамптоншир, Англия
ru.killed in Battle of Wakefield, West Ridi: веикефиелд ст мэри, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard of York 3rd Duke of York родился 20 сентября 1411 г. в местности конисброую кастл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Neville 18 октября 1429 г. в местности конисброую кастл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1431 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1453 году, в возрасте 42 лет, работал по профессии lieutenant of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер 30 декабря 1460 г. в местности веикефиелд ст мэри, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, фотирингхеи, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard of York 3rd Duke of York nació el 20 de septiembre de 1411, en Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard of Conisburgh 3rd Earl of Cambridge, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne de Mortimer Countess of Cambridge, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Cecily Neville el 18 de octubre de 1429, en Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1431. En 1453, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era lieutenant of ireland en Irlanda. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1460, en Wakefield St Mary, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary And All Saints' Church, Fotheringhay, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
